title: Cliffs
body:
This datapack add stony cliffs to Minecraft. This is a port of a feature in [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) that was removed in [Tectonic 2.0](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic/version/2.0).

Feature requests: submit an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/thwonn/cliffs/issues)
